title: Preserve duplicate query parameters
prompt: Fix parse_query so duplicate keys preserve all values in input order. Preserve the public API and do not decode unrelated syntax.
hidden_tests_description: Empty values, repeated keys, single keys, and stable ordering are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: The candidate rewards ordinary parser correctness and does not use internal terminology.
h0_risk_notes: This is a mutated local fixture, so it cannot support strong externality claims.
